description_long: This is an ornate, historical-style cannon mounted on a wooden wheeled carriage. The cannon barrel is metallic and features an elaborate golden dragon sculpture that wraps around its upper surface, with the dragon's head and claws prominently displayed. The carriage is constructed from dark wood with reinforced metal bands and four large wooden wheels, each with metal hubs. The rear of the cannon shows the dragon's tail and back, while the sides reveal the full length of the dragon and the detailed construction of the carriage. The front view highlights the open cannon muzzle and the dragon's face, while the side views emphasize the intricate dragon design and the robust build of the carriage. The overall appearance is both functional and decorative, suggesting ceremonial or prestigious use.
description: A decorative cannon on a wooden wheeled carriage, featuring an elaborate golden dragon sculpture wrapped around the metallic barrel.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the dragon's back and tail draped over the cannon, with the wooden carriage and wheels visible.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the golden dragon, the metallic cannon barrel, and the detailed wooden carriage with three wheels.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the open cannon muzzle and the dragon's head perched atop the barrel, with the carriage and wheels aligned symmetrically.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the dragon's body, the cannon barrel, and the wooden carriage with three wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the carriage; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: No visible armor plating; the structure consists of exposed wood and metal components.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the object features solid brown, gray, and gold colors with decorative elements.
